creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for the report.  Sadly, there is little we can do here, but you 
can easily use later versions of GCC to build your software/ports. 

In the context of the FreeBSD Ports Collection you can easily achieve 
this by using something like 
USE_GCC=4.1+ 
in the Makefile.
